lead.description: PitchBob.io is a multiplatform AI-based idea management platform for entrepreneurs. Founded by Dima Maslennikov back in 2020, a seasoned entrepreneur with a track record of successful exits, PitchBob.io is on a mission to help millions of entrepreneurs and corporate innovation leaders formulate their business ideas annually and create compelling startup pitch decks. In 2023, PitchBob.io experienced a significant breakthrough with the rise of generative AI and the advent of chatGPT, becoming more intuitive and smart.
